name: Yusuf Ciger
professional_summary: Analytical and systems-focused MSc Data Science graduate with experience improving operational workflows, automating reporting processes, and supporting data-driven decision making. Proven ability to identify inefficiencies, implement automation solutions, and collaborate with stakeholders to enhance system performance. Seeking to develop within a high-growth organisation as a Graduate Analyst.

details: Applied data analysis and modelling techniques to support structured decision-making.
Developed automated data pipelines and forecasting models.
Built strong foundation in databases, systems design, and process optimisation.

responsibilities: Took on a self-employed role upon relocating to the UK to gain immediate exposure to a fast-paced, customer-facing environment.
Engage directly with customers to communicate value propositions and convert interest into agreements in a target-driven setting.
Adapt communication approach in real-time based on customer behaviour, improving conversion outcomes.
Developed strong objection-handling, resilience and persuasion skills through high-volume daily interactions.
Identified inefficiencies in a manual CI/CD reporting workflow used by analysts and redesigned the process using Python-based automation.
Developed structured Excel reporting outputs to support faster operational decision-making.
Collaborated with analysts to gather requirements and improve reporting accuracy and usability.
achievements: Reduced manual reporting effort by 80% by implementing automated data extraction and validation pipelines.
Improved overall process efficiency by 30% through workflow redesign and automation.

experience.role: Teaching Assistant -- Introduction to Data Science
responsibilities: Delivered structured analytical sessions to 30+ students, improving problem-solving capabilities.
Provided feedback on data analysis approaches, enhancing structured thinking and interpretation.
Supported coordination between academic staff and students to maintain consistent learning outcomes.
Analysed programme performance data to identify improvement areas and support decision-making.
Assisted in tracking project milestones and maintaining structured delivery processes.
Contributed to workflow coordination within a small, cross-functional team environment.
Supported ERP-based order and inventory processes to improve operational visibility.
Generated structured shipment reports to enhance tracking accuracy across teams.

skills: Data analysis and reporting for business decisions
right_to_work: Full right to work in the UK (Graduate Visa, no sponsorship required)
strengths: Objection-handling, resilience and persuasion (from high-volume customer interactions)
